estimate.diagnosis: Possible oil leak from valve covers, indicated by smell and OBD codes P0300 and P0171.
repairSteps: Inspect and replace valve cover gasket
Check for any other signs of engine damage
proTips: Use a UV dye test to detect any internal engine leaks
Check the PCV valve for any blockages
additionalChecks: Check for any signs of engine overheating
Inspect the engine for any other signs of wear or damage
estimate.notes: Customer reports no issues, but mechanic notices a strong oil smell. OBD codes indicate possible engine misfire and fuel trim issues.
